text-color-on-primary.$description: Use for text on primary color

secondary-text-color.$description: Use when you need text with lesser importance

warning-color-selected.$description: Use as selected indication for a warning color

primary-highlighted-color.$description: Use this to indicate selected state of primary items

negative-color-selected.$description: Use as selected indication for a negative color

negative-color-hover.$description: Use as hover color on negative color

positive-color-selected.$description: Use as selected indication for a positive colors

ui-background-color.$description: Background color for ui elements and components

ui-border-color.$description: Border color for ui elements and components

disabled-background-color.$description: Use as background for disabled elements

warning-color-selected-hover.$description: Use as selected hover indication for a negative color

fixed-light-color.$description: Use as color that should remain light in all themes

warning-color-hover.$description: Use as hover indication for a warning color

primary-color.$description: Use this to emphasis main ui components

placeholder-color.$description: Use for placeholder text in inputs fields

primary-selected-hover-color.$description: Use this to indicate hover selected state of brand items

secondary-background-color.$description: Secondary background color (frosted-glass: translucent white surface, pair with backdrop-blur)

primary-hover-color.$description: Use as a hover on primary color

positive-color-hover.$description: Use as hover color on positive color

primary-surface-color.$description: Use this as the surface of the main layout appearance

primary-selected-color.$description: Use this to indicate selected state of primary items

layout-border-color.$description: Border color for general layout and separators (frosted-glass hairline: low-alpha)

positive-color-selected-hover.$description: Use as selected hover indication for a positive colors

fixed-dark-color.$description: Use as color that should remain dark in all themes

negative-color-selected-hover.$description: Use as selected hover indication for a negative color

text-color-on-inverted.$description: Inverted text color (opposite of primary text color)

disabled-text-color.$description: Use as text in disabled components

brand-color.$description: Use this to emphasis main brand CTA

brand-hover-color.$description: Use as a hover on brand color

brand-selected-color.$description: Use this to indicate selected state of brand items

brand-selected-hover-color.$description: Use this to indicate hover selected state of brand items

brand-highlighted-color.$description: Use this to indicate highlighted state of brand items
